critical.description: Required legal page /terms does not exist
Required legal page /cookies does not exist

high.description: /press/[id] uses notFound() — data-dependent 404 risk with no individual sitemap entries
high.remediation: Add dynamic press release routes to sitemap.ts or implement ISR fallback

high.description: lighthouserc.js has SEO category at warn level instead of error
high.remediation: Promote categories:seo from warn to error in lighthouserc.js

medium.description: sitemap.ts uses hardcoded STATIC_LAST_MODIFIED date instead of actual content modification dates
medium.remediation: Replace STATIC_LAST_MODIFIED with git commit dates or build-time timestamps
